description_long: This is a hand-crafted terracotta vase with a bulbous body and a narrow, slightly flared neck. The surface is adorned with bold, dark blue painted motifs, including abstract floral and geometric patterns, which stand out against the natural reddish-brown clay. The vase exhibits visible hand-thrown ridges and some irregularities, giving it a rustic, artisanal character. There is a noticeable patch of discoloration and a small chip on one side, suggesting some age or wear. The interior appears unglazed and matches the exterior clay tone. This decorative piece would be well-suited for display in an urban outdoor or semi-public setting, such as a park or community garden.
description: A rustic terracotta vase with dark blue painted floral and abstract motifs, featuring a bulbous body and narrow neck with visible hand-crafted texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main floral motif in dark blue, centered on the widest part of the vase's body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more abstract blue patterns and the vase's rounded profile, with less prominent decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a patch of discoloration and a small chip, with minimal painted decoration visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays additional abstract blue motifs and the vase's hand-thrown texture.
